MRI Offline Planning Guide
offline-ready
Neuro
Brain4
IAM2
Pituitary2
Spine

Reference legend
∥ parallel
⟂ perpendicular
▸ coverage
⚠ sat band
🧠 Brain
Neuro
4 sequences
📐 Axial
axial
├─sag∥ AC-PC line
├─cor⟂ brainstem
└─▸ vertex → foramen magnum
Axial — parallel to AC-PC on sagittal
🔬 DWI
DWI
├─sag∥ base of skull (glabella → foramen magnum)
└─cor⟂ brainstem
DWI — angled to glabella–foramen magnum
🔳 Coronal
coronal
├─sag∥ brainstem⟂ AC-PC
├─axial⟂ midline
└─▸ frontal sinus → occipital protuberance
Coronal — perpendicular to AC-PC on sagittal
📏 Sagittal
sagittal
├─axial∥ midline
├─cor∥ midline
└─▸ R temporal lobe → L temporal lobe
Sagittal — parallel to brain midline on axial
👂 IAM
Neuro
2 sequences
📐 Axial 3D
axial 3D
├─cor∥ R–L line of both IAMs
├─sag⟂ brainstem
└─▸ hippocampus → C1
Axial 3D — parallel to R–L IAM line on coronal
🔳 Coronal T2
coronal
├─axial∥ R–L line of both IAMs
├─sag∥ brainstem
└─▸ post. sphenoid sinus → 4th ventricle
Coronal — parallel to IAM line on axial
🫘 Pituitary
Neuro
2 sequences
📏 Sagittal
sagittal
├─axial∥ brain midline
├─cor∥ brain midline
└─▸ R ICA → L ICA
Sagittal — parallel to brain midline on axial
🔳 Coronal
coronal
├─sag⟂ sella turcica
├─axial⟂ brain midline
└─▸ ant. sphenoid sinus → ant. pons
Coronal — perpendicular to sella on sagittal
🦴 Cervical Spine
Spine
2 sequences
📏 Sagittal
sagittal
├─cor∥ spinal cord
├─axial∥ vertebral body → spinous process
├─⚠ sat band anterior to esophagus
└─▸ pons → T3
Sagittal — parallel to spinal cord on coronal
📐 Axial
axial
├─sag∥ each disc
├─cor∥ disc space
├─⚠ sat band anterior to esophagus
└─▸ C2 → T1
Axial — angled parallel to each disc on sagittal
🦴 Thoracic Spine
Spine
2 sequences
📏 Sagittal
sagittal
├─cor∥ spinal cord
├─axial∥ vertebral body → spinous process
├─⚠ sat band over chest
└─▸ C7 → T12
Sagittal — parallel to spinal cord on coronal
📐 Axial
axial
├─sag∥ each disc
├─cor∥ disc space
├─⚠ sat band over chest
└─▸ T1 → T12
Axial — angled parallel to each disc on sagittal
🦴 Lumbar Spine
Spine
2 sequences
📏 Sagittal
sagittal
├─cor∥ spinal cord
├─axial∥ vertebral body → spinous process
├─⚠ sat band anterior to aorta
└─▸ T11 → coccyx
Sagittal — parallel to spinal cord on coronal
📐 Axial (disc blocks)
axial
├─sag∥ each disc space(L5/S1, L4/5, L3/4…)
├─cor∥ disc space
├─no block overlap at canal
└─▸ 5 slices per disc
Axial — angled blocks parallel to each disc on sagittal
💪 Shoulder
MSK
3 sequences
📐 Axial
axial
├─cor⟂ glenohumeral joint
├─sag⟂ humeral head
└─▸ AC joint → inf. glenohumeral ligament
Axial — perpendicular to glenohumeral joint
🔳 Coronal Oblique
coronal oblique
├─axial∥ supraspinatus tendon(<45°)
├─sag∥ humeral head
└─▸ coracoid → 2 slices post. humeral head
Coronal oblique — parallel to supraspinatus tendon
📏 Sagittal Oblique
sagittal oblique
├─axial⟂ supraspinatus tendon
├─cor∥ humerus
└─▸ deltoid → scapular notch
Sagittal oblique — perpendicular to supraspinatus tendon
🦴 Hip
MSK
3 sequences
🔳 Coronal
coronal
├─axial∥ R & L femoral heads
├─sag∥ femur
└─▸ ischial tuberosities → pubic symphysis
Coronal — parallel to both femoral heads on axial
📐 Axial
axial
├─cor∥ R & L femoral heads
├─sag⟂ femur
└─▸ ASIS → 1″ below lesser trochanter
Axial — parallel to femoral heads on coronal
📏 Sagittal
sagittal
├─cor∥ femur
├─axial⟂ femoral head
└─▸ greater trochanter → acetabulum
Sagittal — parallel to femur on coronal
🦵 Knee
MSK
3 sequences
📐 Axial
axial
├─cor∥ medial & lateral femoral condyles
├─sag⟂ femur/tibia axis
├─phase dir: R→L
└─▸ tibial tuberosity → superior patella
Axial — parallel to femoral condyles on coronal
📏 Sagittal
sagittal
├─axial∥ lateral femoral condyle(∥ ACL)
├─cor∥ femur/tibia midline
├─phase dir: H→F
└─▸ medial → lateral
Sagittal — parallel to lateral femoral condyle / ACL
🔳 Coronal
coronal
├─axial∥ medial & lateral femoral condyles
├─sag∥ femur/tibia midline
└─▸ anterior → posterior
Coronal — parallel to femoral condyles on axial
🦴 Pelvis
MSK
3 sequences
🔳 Coronal
coronal
├─axial∥ R & L femoral heads
├─sag∥ femur
└─▸ ant. abdominal wall → buttock
Coronal — parallel to femoral heads on axial
📐 Axial
axial
├─cor∥ R & L femoral heads
├─sag⟂ femur
└─▸ 1″ above iliac crest → 2″ below pubic symphysis
Axial — parallel to femoral heads on coronal
📏 Sagittal
sagittal
├─cor∥ lumbar spine & pubic symphysis
├─axial∥ linea alba & median sacral crest
└─▸ R → L
Sagittal — parallel to lumbar spine & pubic symphysis
✕
